chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | chart count over year by intscale
chart.title: damaging wind count v.s year

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | chart count over month by intscale | sort by month
chart.title: damaging wind count v.s month

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | chart count over hour by intscale
chart.title: damaging wind count v.s time

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5
chart.title: the top 5 damaging wind count state

table.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5 | join state [|search sourcetype="wind" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | chart count over state by intscale] | fields - count
table.title: the top 5 damaging wind count state v.s wind scale

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | stats avg(injuries) by intscale
chart.title: the scale of damaging wind v.s average injuries

chart.searchString: sourcetype="wind" | eval intscale="SCALE"+tostring(floor(scale/10)*10) | stats avg(fatalities) by intscale
chart.title: the scale of damaging wind v.s average fatalities
